details.content: This item has been tested to certify it can ship safely in its original box or bag to avoid unnecessary packaging. Since 2015, we have reduced the weight of outbound packaging per shipment by 41% on average, that’s over 2 million tons of packaging material.If you still require Amazon packaging for this item, choose "Ship in Amazon packaging" at checkout. Learn more

about_item: WATERPROOF PREMIUM FABRIC: Made with waterproof, breathable, and durable Oxford fabric, this dog outdoor bed withstands harsh outdoor conditions and prevents pet urine leaks, keeping odors at bay. The double-layer spray-bonded cotton filling provides a soft, comfortable surface while offering long-lasting support for your pet

PORTABLE & FOLDABLE DESIGN: Measuring 26”x43” in L size, this dog mat is lightweight and easily foldable for convenient storage and carrying. It also features a hanging loop, making it perfect for travel or hanging in the car

REVERSIBLE USAGE: Featuring an adorable paw print design on one side and a dirt-resistant low-key gray on the other, this dog bed gives you two style options to suit your pet's preferences and your home decor

EASY TO CLEAN: The pet mat is easy to clean, resistant to scratches, and machine washable, making it simple to keep fresh and hygienic. Small stains can be wiped clean with a damp towel or brush, perfect for busy pet owners who want a hassle-free cleaning

VERSATILE USE OCCASIONS: Ideal for indoor and outdoor use, whether as a dog cage or kennel mat, or a dog camping bed, dog travel accessories, or even as a thoughtful gift.This outdoor waterproof dog bed provides your pet with a comfortable resting spot wherever they go. If you have any quality problems, please feel free to contact us for after-sales service. We value your feedback and are committed to your satisfaction

summary.text: Customers find the dog bed's size perfect for naps and appreciate its portability, with one mentioning it folds compactly into a travel bag. The thickness receives mixed feedback, with several customers noting that the material is thin.

insights.title: Size
insights.summary: Customers like the size of the pet bed, finding it perfect for naps, with one customer specifically mentioning it works well for a Shih Tzu.

examples.snippet: Nice & cushy- great size! I wrap it around an egg crate pad to keep water off of it. This is very nice!
...The xl size is nice but that's it. Disappointed it wasn't what I expected. I am returning, I would have kept it if the cost was like $15....
Perfect for a nap and cooling
Perfect dog bed for the camper. We used it a lot on our recent camping trip. Cleans easily and stores in a compact space.

insights.title: Portability
insights.summary: Customers appreciate the dog bed's portability, with reviews mentioning that it folds compactly into a travel bag and is great for traveling with pets.

examples.snippet: Thin and portable to bring with us to go to boarding
...I do like the how it easily folds to compact into travel bag. Size described as I. The measurement.
...It would be convenient to wear while traveling to outdoor spots.
...Pretty sturdy material, thin and easy to roll up and has a bag for easy storage...

insights.title: Thickness
insights.summary: Customers have mixed opinions about the thickness of the pet bed, with several noting that it is thin.

examples.snippet: ...Pretty sturdy material, thin and easy to roll up and has a bag for easy storage...
Thin and portable to bring with us to go to boarding
Too thin and not worth the amount it costs. It's as thin as a cheap beach towel....

authors_reviews.title: Very good the dogs love it
authors_reviews.text: I love this dog mat. I have it outside even if it gets rain on or dirt on I get the hose hose it off. Let it air dry and give it back to them.
authors_reviews.author: carmen smith

authors_reviews.title: Portable dog bed
authors_reviews.text: Why did you pick this product vs others?:Got this for a camping trip..used it on the car ride with a blanket and dogs were comfortable..we split water and were able to clean it up easily. Pretty sturdy material, thin and easy to roll up and has a bag for easy storage
authors_reviews.author: Nancy

authors_reviews.title: We have 3
authors_reviews.text: We have three of these beds. One is actually used in a kennel. I really like the fact that hair does not stick to them and they are easy to clean. And you can throw them in the wash easy. Our dogs also have Kuranda beds in another part of the house, but they like these in another area. Spoiled.
authors_reviews.author: Sarah

authors_reviews.title: Dogs will love it.
authors_reviews.text: Perfect dog bed for the camper. We used it a lot on our recent camping trip. Cleans easily and stores in a compact space.
authors_reviews.author: Jim Lambert

authors_reviews.title: Great Pet Mat
authors_reviews.text: This mat is great for traveling with your dog. Durable material, wipes and washes off. Folds and rolls up into the bag it comes with. I am very happy I bought it and it's nice to have my dog lay on instead of the ground when we go places. A great buy!
authors_reviews.author: Lindsay M.

authors_reviews.title: Nice & cushy
authors_reviews.text: Nice & cushy- great size! I wrap it around an egg crate pad to keep water off of it. This is very nice!
authors_reviews.author: C. Johnson
